visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a grey-and-white patterned furry bucket hat and a fuzzy lavender-pink cardigan stands in a bright strawberry greenhouse. She holds a light-blue plastic basket with a handful of red strawberries. The background features long rows of elevated strawberry plants under white mesh netting. (2) A close-up shot shows hands wearing yellow gloves using red-handled scissors to clip a large, bright red strawberry from its vine. The strawberry is perfectly heart-shaped and glistening. (3) The camera pans across the vast interior of the greenhouse, revealing white plastic sheeting on the ground and multiple rows of strawberry beds extending into the distance. A woman in a black jacket and red scarf is seen walking in the background. (4) A small white dog, possibly a Maltese, wearing a pink-and-grey knitted sweater, is seen walking in the greenhouse and later sniffing a strawberry held by the main creator. A woman in a black beret sits on the ground interacting with the dog. (5) The creator holds a basket brimming with strawberries and compares a large one to her face, smiling at the camera. The lighting shifts to a golden hour/dusk glow. (6) The scene moves to a storage room where a hand in a pink rubber glove points to various white, yellow, and clear bottles of fertilizers and bio-nutrients arranged on shelves. A large clock is on the wall. (7) Detailed shots of industrial irrigation and filtration equipment are shown, including black cylinders, green pumps, and white tanks containing liquids. A person in pink workwear is visible maintaining the system. (8) At a wooden checkout counter, a person in blue gloves and a denim apron weighs a box of strawberries on a digital scale. The screen shows a variety of digital payment logos. (9) The final scene takes place in an outdoor grassy field at night under artificial lights. Two women play with a large blue exercise ball while the white dog chases after it excitedly.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 老闆娘說這邊. (2) [Variety]: 下面是溫泉水. (3) [Slogan]: 吃溫泉長大的超乾淨草莓園. (4) [Subtitle]: 哇這顆長得好像奶頭喂~ (5) [Variety]: 環境真的很乾淨. (6) [Variety]: 這裡超級大的. (7) [Variety]: 寵物友善. (8) [Subtitle]: 不可以邊採邊吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 要稱重才可以吃. (10) [Variety]: 他今天穿草莓裝. (11) [Slogan]: 又尖又紅. (12) [Slogan]: 又大又圓. (13) [Subtitle]: 就像我的臉一樣圓. (14) [Subtitle]: 你給我注意一點. (15) [Subtitle]: 樟腦油去驅蟲哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 不是殺蟲哦. (17) [Variety]: 草莓會不會吃太好. (18) [Variety]: 光合菌. [Variety]: 老闆娘自己做的. (19) [Variety]: 1號參賽者. [Variety]: 2號參賽者. (20) [Variety]: 結帳方式超方便的. (21) [Variety]: 老闆人真好. (22) [Variety]: 外面還有寵物小孩遊戲區.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 female friend/companion, 1 male worker at counter, and 1 farm staff member in irrigation room.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy pink cardigan, a grey-and-white patterned furry hat, and a black maxi skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An elevated strawberry greenhouse with white mesh netting and rows of plants, an indoor storage/irrigation room with industrial pipes and shelves, and an outdoor grassy field at night.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice narrates excitedly over a fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop BGM track. A soft 'pop' SFX is heard as graphics appear. (2) A sharp 'snip' sound triggers as scissors clip a strawberry, followed by the narrator's high-arousal reaction. (3) A digital 'ding' bell sounds. The narrator maintains a fast speech rate while describing the greenhouse environment. (4) Interaction with a dog triggers a shift to higher pitch variability and a playful tone. A 'boing' cartoon sound effect marks the dog's movement. (5) Fast-paced editing is accompanied by a series of whoosh and sparkle sound effects. The BGM remains consistent in tempo. (6) The acoustic texture changes slightly to an indoor room tone with a 'click' sound as bottles are touched. (7) Liquid sloshing and mechanical hums are heard during the irrigation equipment display, with the BGM ducking slightly under the speech. (8) A percussive 'thud' sound occurs during the weighing scene on the wooden counter. (9) The final phase features outdoor wind noise and loud, high-arousal cheering and laughter as a large ball thumps against the grass rhythmically.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Detailed Experience -> Behind-the-Scenes -> Summary/Interaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique and exceptionally clean strawberry farm that uses hot spring water for irrigation and is pet-friendly, providing a comprehensive tour from picking to production and recreation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed tour of farm facilities, focus on product quality, and positive commentary on services and payment convenience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual and auditory cues typical of social-media vlogs to maintain viewer engagement while providing informative content.
